idea.title: Devourling
idea.hook: Survive an endless swarm — auto-attack, gobble the glowing motes they drop, and evolve from a tiny critter into a screen-clearing monster.
idea.prototype: Top-down neon survivors-like/bullet-heaven: one-input movement (drag-joystick / WASD), auto-attack the nearest enemy, kill-dropped XP motes fill a bar, each level-up pauses for a 1-of-3 upgrade pick (new weapon / stat / evolution), the hero visibly evolves through 4 forms, escalating enemy types + a mini-boss (~min 4) and a screen-filling boss (~min 9). Endless survival, HP lose condition, ~10-minute run.
idea.mutation_of: daily_dodge (our top dodge winner) × the survive-and-evolve market archetype
idea.why_novel: first survivors-like/bullet-heaven in the portfolio; turns our proven dodge loop into an auto-combat + level-up + evolution roguelite

sources.section: danger_combat archetype (portal weight 3501, #2 today); survive-and-evolve top performer
sources.title: Super Evolution Battle
sources.snippet: Top-performing survive-and-evolve battler; the 'evolve into a bigger monster' fantasy is hot on the portal right now.

sources.title: Age of Heroes
sources.snippet: Immediate-conflict combat card; danger_combat is the #2 portal CTR archetype today.

sources.title: Lazy Apocalypse: Zombie Tower Defense & Idle TD
sources.snippet: Swarm-survival framing with auto-combat + escalating waves; validates the 'hold off an escalating horde' loop.

sources.section: our own data — top dodge winner (100% like ratio)
sources.title: daily_dodge
sources.snippet: DODGE is our best-liked genre with a 100% like ratio in our gallery data; 'move to survive escalating threat density' is already proven with our audience. Devourling extends it with the level-up/evolution depth pure dodge lacks.

synthesizer_brief: Mutate our proven 100%-liked DODGE loop into the hot survive-and-evolve market archetype: keep the one-input 'move to survive escalating density' core, add auto-combat + XP motes + a 1-of-3 level-up evolution tree, for the first bullet-heaven/survivors-like in the portfolio.

alternatives.title: Tier Board Merge
alternatives.hook: Classic clean grid triple-merge — line up matching tiles to climb a tier ladder.
alternatives.why_novel: classic clean board-merge — #1 market archetype today

alternatives.title: Active Diner Rush
alternatives.hook: Serve a rush of customers, reinvest tips, upgrade the diner.

alternatives.title: Roguelite Tower Hold
alternatives.hook: Hold a lane against escalating waves with per-wave build choices.
